creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thank you for your submission.

I have been unable to fetch the 1.6.0 distfile, but since 1.6.1 is 
available I updated the port to that version.

The patches I added are taken from upstream:

https://github.com/QupZilla/qupzilla/commit/15844ceeab723b99d48c133b09e18470da302466

Can you test and approve the attached patch?

Thanks.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
